productDisplayName: Baggit Women Red Border Lisa Wallet
description: Style Note Simple yet classy look of this pink baggit purse gives you the feel of uniqueness.It offers rich texture and trendy style that makeup the elements responsible for creating a wow-statement as you step out. With handy compartments and slim & sleek design, this purse is the perfect way to pep up your evening portfolio.Product Details  Red wallet has a flap style three-fold opening with a press button closureOne insert pocket on the first fold Six card holders and two insert pockets on the second fold One zippered pocket and one insert pocket on the centre Branding on the back and one zippered pocket Material and Care Wipe surface with a clean and dry cloth to remove dustSize Height: 10 cm Width: 19 cm Depth: 1 cm
